title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Acuite Ratings - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Acuite Ratings - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Acuite Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Acuite Ratings:
Acuite Ratings is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Acuite Ratings!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
